triggers.description: Whenever CARDNAME attacks or blocks, other Rats you control get +X/+X where X is the number of Rats you control.
Whenever CARDNAME attacks or blocks, other Rats you control get +X/+X where X is the number of Rats you control.

At the beginning of your end step, you may mill four cards. If you do, return up to two Rat creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. (To mill a card, put the top card of your library into your graveyard.)
